sidebar.wechat_hint: Local bot + Tencent's official ClawBot — pipe WeChat into EchoMind
sidebar.cloud_hint: Multi-device sync via VPS + optional shared LLM calls

home.no_chats_hint: Pick a note from the main list and click "Chat" to start
home.clusters_empty: Record more notes to surface topic clusters
home.review_empty: Once you've captured a few notes, the forgotten gems will surface here.

thought.append_placeholder_root: Append to this note… (Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to send)

appearance.compact_desc: Reduce spacing and font size for higher info density.

llm.base_url_hint: DeepSeek is auto-filled. Other providers usually leave this blank.

test.verify_desc: Save and test the current config.

bridge_stale.title: Cloud bridge is still using the old LLM config
bridge_stale.desc_a: Local LLM config has been updated, but "Route LLM via cloud bridge" is on — WeChat
bridge_stale.desc_b: and other bridge-routed calls still use the key/model previously pushed to the VPS.

embedding.local_info: Local mode uses the bundled BGE-small-zh-v1.5 model (the first launch downloads ~90MB of ONNX files), then runs fully offline. After saving, we recommend running "Data → Rebuild vector index" once.
embedding.api_key_placeholder: Leave blank to share the LLM API key

websearch.intro: The "Related resources" panel currently relies on LLM memory to recommend URLs, often producing 404s. After configuring a search API, the backend runs a real web search first, then lets the model pick from accessible candidates, eliminating 404s. Leave blank = original LLM path (compatibility).
websearch.key_hint_b: to sign up → copy the API key from Dashboard.

ai.auto_tag_desc: Let AI generate domain and tags for new ideas.
ai.semantic_desc: Recommend related entries for similar ideas.
ai.auto_analyze_desc: Automatically call AI to generate context after a new idea is saved.

data.export_desc: Export all ideas, conversations and settings as a JSON file.
data.import_desc: Restore from a previously exported file.
data.rebuild_desc: Re-embed all ideas to restore semantic search. May take a while.
data.wipe_desc: Permanently delete all ideas, conversations and embedding vectors.

about.description: A local-first AI inspiration companion that helps you record, enrich and explore every idea. Built with Tauri, React and Rust.
about.check_updates_desc: Auto-checks at startup; click here to check now.

skills_tab.empty_hint: Create one, or drop a .md file into the skills directory
skills_tab.scan_no_new: No new skills found (all already imported)
skills_tab.delete_confirm_a: Are you sure you want to delete

chat_hub.synthesize_title: Let AI turn this conversation into a deliverable plan document
chat_hub.initial_prompt: Please start probing this idea — help me think it through.
chat_hub.resources_analyzing: AI is analyzing and recommending resources...
chat_hub.withdraw_message: After withdrawing, this message and the subsequent AI replies will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
chat_hub.picker_heading: Pick an idea to start chatting
chat_hub.picker_subhead: Pick an existing chat from the sidebar, or pick an idea below to dive deeper.
chat_hub.picker_empty: No ideas yet — go capture one from the home page

search.reindex_title: Reindex all ideas (use after embedding logic changes)
search.no_results_hint: Try different keywords, or capture more ideas
search.initial_hint: Type a description and hit Enter — AI will surface semantically related content

archive.confirm_restore_message: Restore this idea? It will reappear in the main list.
archive.confirm_delete_message: Permanently delete "{{preview}}…"? This cannot be undone.

capture.label: Quick capture
capture.shortcut_hint: Enter to save · Esc to close

errors.bridge_jwt: Cloud-bridge token expired or invalid — please re-pair on the Cloud Bridge page.
errors.pair_code_invalid: Pair code is invalid or expired — request a fresh one from your VPS.
errors.api_key_invalid: API key is invalid or unauthorized — double-check your LLM provider key in Settings.
errors.no_permission: You don't have permission for this operation.
errors.rate_limit: Rate limit reached — slow down or wait a minute before retrying.
errors.quota_exceeded: API quota or balance exhausted — top up your provider account.
errors.model_not_found: Model not found or not available — check the model name in Settings.
errors.context_too_long: Input is too long for the model's context window — shorten the prompt or attached content.
errors.network_failed: Network request failed — check your connection or proxy settings.
errors.server_unavailable: Upstream server is unavailable — try again later.

cloud_bridge.title: Cloud Bridge
cloud_bridge.subtitle: Sync filtered ideas to your VPS so the WeChat bot still works when your desktop is off.
cloud_bridge.consent_required: Please confirm the privacy notice first
cloud_bridge.fields_required: Server URL and pair code are required
cloud_bridge.pull_done: Pulled {{count}} new ideas from the cloud
cloud_bridge.pull_empty: No new updates on the cloud
cloud_bridge.consent_llm_required: Please confirm the LLM consent first
cloud_bridge.llm_clear_confirm: This will delete the LLM config from the VPS — WeChat /chat won't work remotely. Proceed?
cloud_bridge.terminate_confirm: Terminating the subscription will immediately destroy cloud data and clear local binding. Proceed?
cloud_bridge.terminated: Subscription terminated and cloud data destroyed
cloud_bridge.reset_local_confirm:
Reset local credentials only: clear local token / device id / sync cursor, but KEEP all cloud data on the VPS.

Next step: get a new pair code from the VPS and re-pair.

Proceed?
cloud_bridge.local_reset_done: Local credentials cleared. Please re-bind with a new pair code.
cloud_bridge.sync_fp_copy_title: Click to copy — the bot must use this value when pairing, otherwise it lands in a different device library and won't interop
cloud_bridge.rebind_desc: Use when the local token expires or you want to switch devices. Clears local credentials then re-binds with a new pair code; VPS-side ideas / bot config / LLM keys are preserved.
cloud_bridge.llm_via_bridge_desc: When enabled, desktop AI calls are routed through the VPS to bypass local geo-blocks. You must first push the LLM config to the VPS below.
cloud_bridge.rules_section_desc: Default: push every unarchived idea. Expand to filter by time window / tags.
cloud_bridge.llm_section_desc_a: Push your local LLM key to the VPS so WeChat
cloud_bridge.llm_section_desc_b: can call AI directly from your phone without the desktop being online.
cloud_bridge.llm_warn_1: The LLM API key is encrypted with the server-side master key before storage; the VPS admin can still decrypt it.
cloud_bridge.llm_warn_2: Every remote /chat is billed against your API quota — set a budget cap.
cloud_bridge.llm_warn_3: You can revoke any time by clicking "Clear", or destroy everything in "Danger zone".
cloud_bridge.llm_consent: I understand the risks and consent to pushing the LLM key
cloud_bridge.danger_section_desc: Terminate the subscription / destroy cloud data
cloud_bridge.terminate_desc: Terminating the subscription will immediately destroy all idea copies, WeChat bot config and the optional LLM key on the cloud.
cloud_bridge.privacy_summary: Ideas matching your rules are stored in plaintext on your VPS; secrets are encrypted but admins can still access them; you can terminate any time to destroy everything.
cloud_bridge.privacy_detail_1: Enabling the cloud bridge means rule-matched ideas are stored in plaintext on your VPS.
cloud_bridge.privacy_detail_2: The server holds the full subset for offline WeChat bot access — this is not end-to-end encrypted.
cloud_bridge.privacy_detail_3: WeChat bot_token and the optional LLM key are stored encrypted, but the VPS admin still has physical access.
cloud_bridge.privacy_detail_4: You can terminate the subscription any time — cloud data is destroyed immediately.
cloud_bridge.privacy_consent: I have read and understand the privacy cost above
cloud_bridge.device_code: One-time pair code (issued by the server)
cloud_bridge.device_code_hint_b: on your VPS to fetch one.

wechat_bridge.title: WeChat Bridge
wechat_bridge.subtitle: Pipe your second brain into WeChat: send a message and it's saved; the desktop syncs and notifies you within ~5 seconds.
wechat_bridge.cloud_active_title: WeChat bridge is connected via the cloud bridge
wechat_bridge.cloud_active_desc_b: , the desktop doesn't need a local daemon. The "not started" state below refers to the local daemon — that's normal; WeChat will still send and receive messages.
wechat_bridge.qr_hint_default: Open WeChat and scan the QR code to pair your device.
wechat_bridge.ready_hint: Send a text in WeChat to record an idea; send /help to view commands.
wechat_bridge.qr_expired: QR code expired — please try again
wechat_bridge.connect_hint: Scan once to use EchoMind from WeChat
wechat_bridge.start_bridge_title: Start the local bot and log in to the previously bound WeChat account
wechat_bridge.scan_button_title: Start the local server + bot, invoke Tencent's official ilink interface and show the QR code on this page
wechat_bridge.scan_hint: Clicking will start the local bot and show a QR code — scan it with WeChat to bind. The bound account is stored encrypted locally.

updater.update_available_message: Found new version v{{version}} (current v{{current}}). Download and install now?{{tail}}
updater.install_failed_message:
Install failed: {{msg}}

You can download the latest version manually from GitHub.

errors.bridge_jwt: Cloud Bridge credentials have expired — please go to the Cloud Bridge page and re-pair.
errors.pair_code_invalid: Pair code is invalid or expired — please request a new one.
errors.api_key_invalid: API key is invalid or unauthorized — go to Settings → LLM to verify the key.
errors.no_permission: No access permission — this model may not be available for your account.
errors.rate_limit: Too many calls, please wait and retry.
errors.quota_exceeded: API quota exhausted — top up your LLM provider account and try again.
errors.model_not_found: The selected model does not exist or is unavailable — go to Settings → LLM and pick another model.
errors.context_too_long: Conversation context is too long — trim history or shorten the content and resend.
errors.network_failed: Network connection failed — check your network or proxy settings.
errors.server_unavailable: LLM service is temporarily unavailable, please retry later.
errors.file_not_found: File not found — it may have been moved or deleted.
errors.db_busy: Local database is busy, please retry shortly.

thought_list.empty_hint: Capture your first idea — even a single word will do

title_bar.close_title: Close window (minimizes to tray, app keeps running in background — right-click the tray to quit completely)

graph.title: Mind graph
graph.empty_hint: Capture ideas and let AI process them — they'll appear here
graph.legend_other_intro: Other colors are clustered by topic:
graph.legend_other_topics: Other topics: colored automatically by name

onboarding.provider_openai_hint: International version — overseas payment required. Most models.
onboarding.provider_claude_hint: Anthropic official — best for deep conversation, overseas payment required.
onboarding.provider_gemini_hint: Google's generous free tier — great for hands-on testing.
onboarding.provider_deepseek_hint: Easy domestic top-up — starts at ¥10. Recommended for new users.
onboarding.no_key: Please enter the API key first
onboarding.welcome_intro: A local-first + WeChat-native idea notebook. Three lines for what it does:
onboarding.feature_capture_text: — press {{shortcut}} anywhere to pop the floater, hit Enter to save. WeChat messages also land here.
onboarding.feature_ai_text: — auto-completes context/tags; multi-select ideas to summarize and export MD/DOCX/PDF.
onboarding.feature_local_text: — all data stays local by default; LLM calls use your own API key, never going through any third party.
onboarding.config_llm_desc: EchoMind uses an LLM for auto-completion and deep conversation. Pick a Provider and enter a key (never uploaded to any third-party server).
onboarding.default_model_hint_b: — you can change it later in Settings.
onboarding.first_thought_intro: Write anything — an idea, a todo, a one-liner. After saving, AI will auto-complete tags and context.
onboarding.first_thought_placeholder: e.g. I just had a product idea: connect inspiration capture with WeChat so any thought can land in 30 seconds...
onboarding.wechat_desc: EchoMind integrates Tencent's 2026-released official WeChat ClawBot — send a message from your phone, it saves; the desktop syncs and notifies within 30 seconds.
onboarding.wechat_scan: Scan to use, no ban risk. You can also open the "WeChat Bridge" tab in the sidebar later.
onboarding.wechat_step_2: Click "Start WeChat bridge" and wait for the daemon to launch the official CLI
onboarding.wechat_step_3: Scan the QR code with your WeChat to authorize

drawer.archive_confirm_message: After archiving, this idea will be removed from the main list — you can find and restore it from the archive page.
